approveExpense(uint256).notice: Auditor signs an expense. Once `requiredApprovals` distinct signatures are         collected the expense transitions to Approved automatically.

getAmountInUSD(uint256).notice: Converts a wei amount to USD value (8 decimals). Returns 0 if price feed unavailable.

getCategoryInfo(string).notice: Returns the budget cap, amount spent, and remaining headroom for a category.

getLatestETHPrice().notice: Returns the latest ETH/USD price from Chainlink (8 decimals, e.g. 300000000000 = $3,000).

hasApproved(uint256,address).notice: Check whether a specific auditor has already signed a given expense.

setCategoryBudget(string,uint256).notice: Set a per-category spending cap (in wei). Pass 0 to remove the cap.

setRequiredApprovals(uint256).notice: Set how many distinct auditor signatures are required to approve an expense.

setTimeLockDelay(uint256).notice: Set the time-lock delay (in seconds) applied to flagged expenses after approval.

setVelocityThreshold(uint256).notice: Set how many payments to the same receiver within 7 days triggers a flag.
